name: PolyPeptide Group AG
summary: PolyPeptide Group AG operates as a pharmaceutical products contract development and manufacturing organization worldwide. It focuses on proprietary and generic GMP-grade peptides used by pharmaceutical and biotech companies in approved pharmaceutical products, drugs in clinical development, and in generic products. The company provides GMP compliance and inspection, custom research and development, pre-GMP development, production, quality assurance, quality control, and regulatory support services. It also manufactures and sells peptide-based generics, cosmetic peptides, and individualized peptide therapeutics. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Zug, Switzerland.
